headline: How The Western Digital (WDC) Narrative Is Shifting With AI Storage Hopes And Lofty Targets
summary: Western Digital’s model fair value holds at $321.0, keeping the central price anchor steady even as assumptions around the story evolve. That stability sits alongside broadly constructive analyst commentary, where firms pointing to AI related storage demand and management’s earnings and margin goals have been updating their price targets and sharpening views on what the stock could be worth. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting targets and what they might mean for your own...

headline: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Gain As Traders Weigh Fed And Inflation
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Wednesday, Mar, 18 2026 US stock futures are pointing higher this morning, with contracts tied to the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 both in positive territory, as investors focus on three big themes. First, the Federal Reserve is expected to keep its key interest rate in a 3.5% to 3.75% range, while updating its economic outlook, which matters for borrowing costs on mortgages, credit cards, and business loans. headline: Micron Earnings Face High Expectations as Its Stock Keeps Rising
summary: Micron shares have soared more than 60% to start the year, the sixth-best performance in the S&P 500 Index, after jumping 239% in 2025.  The biggest US maker of memory chips is benefiting from heavy spending on artificial intelligence computing that’s driving demand for memory and storage components, as are high-flying peers Sandisk Corp. and Western Digital Corp.

content.title: Micron Earnings Face High Expectations as Its Stock Keeps Rising

headline: Ethisphere Names WD as One of the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies® for the Eighth Time
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., March 18, 2026--Western Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: WDC), the storage foundation of the AI-driven data economy, has been recognized for the eighth consecutive year as one of the 2026 World’s Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere, a global leader in defining and advancing the standards of ethical business practices.
